description: The Slot Inspector component controls the slot items shown in a Scene Inspector and their drop down menus.

fields._rootSlot: The root of the visual for this item.
fields._childContainer: The container for slot inspectors that are children of this one.
fields._depth: How far down this slot inspector is from the root selected slot inspector in it's parent Scene Inspector.
fields._expander: The component responsible for expanding the children slot inspector hierarchy of this item.
fields._expanderIndicator: The indicator for whether the slot inspector children hierarchy is expanded or not.
fields._slotNameText: The name of the slot this slot inspector is pointing to.

methods.IsTargetEmpty: When called, returns if the target slot contains no children slots.

usage: Not used directly by the user. Used in Scene Inspectors.
